title: 10 health benefits of Alchemilla vulcanica (lady's mantle)
intro: Alchemilla vulcanica has health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and astringent properties. Its medicinal properties help to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps and heavy bleeding, and alleviate skin irritations like eczema and acne. For example, women can use it to treat dysmenorrhea, a condition characterized by severe menstrual pain, allowing them to live comfortably during their periods.
